description: Peter Lock has worked in the higher activity radioactive waste management field for 25 years. He has a chemistry degree and began his career as an environmental consultant. Peter has had roles in radioactive waste packaging standards and nuclear safety case development. He is now responsible for engagement with the nuclear industry regulators, advising the organisation on regulatory requirements and providing independent assurance that its health, safety, security and environmental obligations are being met.

details.body:
Peter Lock has worked in the higher activity radioactive waste management field for 25 years. He has a chemistry degree and began his career as an environmental consultant.

Peter has had roles in radioactive waste packaging standards and nuclear safety case development. He is now responsible for engagement with the nuclear industry regulators, advising the organisation on regulatory requirements and providing independent assurance that its health, safety, security and environmental obligations are being met.
